p2g-desc: Uploads page content to a GitHub repository on page save
p2g-specialpage-text: This page shows details on ''PageToGitHub'' configuration
p2g-specialpage-variables-text: This section shows the values of ''PageToGitHub'' configuration variables
p2g-config-ignoreminor: Ignore page saves flagged as minor edits
p2g-config-namespace: Name of the namespace whose pages are synced to GitHub
p2g-config-owner: GitHub username or organisation that owns the target repository
p2g-config-repo: Name of the GitHub repository where files are saved
p2g-config-keyword: Optional keyword: only pages containing this string are synced. Leave empty to sync all pages in the namespace
p2g-config-addkeyword: Prefix the synced filename with the keyword defined in P2GKeyword
p2g-config-authtoken: GitHub personal access token used to authenticate API calls
